name: GENERAL ELECTRIC CO
summary: General Electric Company is an industrial corporation headquartered in Evendale, Ohio. Based on the 10-K filing structure referencing business operations, properties, and financial disclosures, GE operates in industrial segments. The filing covers fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, and was signed by Chairman H. Lawrence Culp, Jr., with CFO Rahul Ghai and audited by Deloitte and Touche LLP.

partnerships.description: Principal independent auditor for GE, PCAOB ID No. 34, referenced in 2026 Proxy Statement.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
